Galaxy Digital To Pay $200 Million In Terra-LUNA Settlement With New York Attorney General
data.description: Galaxy Digital has reached a $200 million settlement with the New York Attorney General (NYAG), following allegations the firm failed to disclose its financial interests while promoting the now-collapsed LUNA cryptocurrency.
